body.title: Hello, my name is Mochammad Yoga Prasetya, but my friends often call me Yoga. I come from Pembangunan Jaya University with a major in Information Systems. I love to learn something new and get input to make myself better and develop.

I live in Pamulang, South Tangerang. Now I am concentrating on web programming which is exploring full stack development that deals with Backend and Frontend. This website is not only as a learning tool but also as a place to showcase my projects and as a place to see the history of my experience.

title.name: You can see my personal projects
You can see my professional project

personal.title: Instagram Clone
personal.deskripsi: Instagram clone created using Next.js, firebase for authentication, data storage

blog.des_blog: Welcome to **Instagram Clone** with **Next.js** || Aug 21, 2022||
I am proud to present my work, an **Instagram Clone** app built using **Next.js. In this project, I explored the potential of Next.js** to create an Instagram-like experience.

The app has somewhat incomplete functionality, allowing users to upload photos, and is still developing on browsing feeds, and interacting with friends and other users. Using **Next.js technology, the app offers high speed and responsiveness, allowing users to enjoy a seamless experience.
%/img/instagram-clone/thumbnile.png%
I hope you enjoy this app and feel free to let me know if you have any problems or suggestions for improving this app.
Thank you for taking the time to read this. I hope you enjoy this app 🚀✨.

personal.title: Whatsapp Clone
personal.deskripsi: Whatsapp clone created using Next.js, firebase for authentication, data storage

blog.des_blog: Welcome to **Whatsapp Clone** with **Next.js** || Aug 21, 2022||

I'm proud to show you a small project, a chat app similar to **Whatsap, through a clone app I made using **Next.js! This app showcases key features such as text messaging. Built using **Next.js and **Firebas technologies. I carefully developed this app with a focus on user security and privacy.
%/img/whatsapp-clone/whatsapp-clone.png%
In the application I created is a clone of my version of whatsapp web using **Next.js.
%/img/whatsapp-clone/google_login.png%
I hope you enjoy this app and feel free to let me know if you have any problems or suggestions for improving this app.
Thank you for taking the time to read this. I hope you enjoy this app 🚀✨.

propesional.title: Lomba UI/UX
propesional.deskripsi: Lomba UI/UX pada website Se Jawa Barat.

blog.des_blog: Selamat datang **Lomba UI/UX** dengan **Laravel dan React.js** ||5 Aug 2022||

Saya bangga memperlihatkan project kecil, yaitu sebuah aplikasi chatting yang serupa dengan **Whatsap, melalui aplikasi clone yang saya buat menggunakan ** Next.js! Aplikasi ini memperlihatkan fitur-fitur utama seperti pengiriman pesan teks. Dibangun dengan menggunakan teknologi ** Next.js dan **Firebas. Saya dengan hati-hati mengembangkan aplikasi ini dengan fokus pada keamanan dan privasi pengguna.
%/img/whatsapp-clone/whatsapp-clone.png%
Pada aplikasi yang saya buat adalah sebuah cloningan dari whatsapp web versi saya dengan menggunakan **Next.js.
%/img/whatsapp-clone/google_login.png%
Saya berharap Anda menikmati aplikasi ini dan jangan ragu untuk memberi tahu saya jika Anda memiliki masalah atau saran untuk meningkatkan aplikasi ini.
Terima kasih telah meluangkan waktu untuk membaca ini. Saya harap Anda menikmati aplikasi ini 🚀✨.
